name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
subject: this one word made all the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Did you notice this in the headline?
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

I hope you got a chance to read the Federalist article that the team sent over. But there’s one detail in the title I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss: “ _Romney And Kushner’s Man In Tennessee Might Be Coming To The Senate (_If_ He Wins The Primary)._” It’s that word, “if.” **The Machine is trying to steamroll Dr. Manny’s insurgent grassroots campaign. But whether they are able to do that is up to us.** It’s the FINAL week of the primary, and right now it looks like our race is going to be a photo-finish. Every penny you give could make the difference between victory and defeat. **[Will you help us get across the finish line today?](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-j/)** [DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-t/) Thank you,
Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
Dr. Manny Sethi for Senate \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Manny
Date: July 30th, 2020
Subject: Federalist: Romney’s man Bill Hagerty coming to the Senate

Forrest,

**All we can say is WOW - this article from the Federalist absolutely nails what’s at stake in our primary this week:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-i/) [READ THE ARTICLE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-d/) And the whole article is just as dead-on as the title:

_"A number of months ago, outgoing Tennessee Sen. Lamar Alexander shepherded [Hagerty] around the Senate Republican lunch, introducing him to attendees. As Hagerty turned to leave, he assured the room “I’m on the team.” Upon returning to his office, one conservative senator reportedly asked his staff, “Who the f— was that guy?”

“I’m on the team” is a message Republican leadership, including Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, likes to hear. McConnell was an early endorser of Hagerty, and has been joined by the Chamber of Commerce, a pro-corporate organization generally aligned against the base and sometimes against the president. Conservative base favorites like Sens. Rand Paul and Ted Cruz, radio host Mark Levin, and former Sen. Jim DeMint, however, have endorsed Hagerty’s opponent, Dr. Manny Sethi."_

**[Click here to read the full article.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-h/)** It’s the single best explanation of what’s really happening behind the scenes in our race.

We’ve only got a few days left. **Please, send this article to every friend or family member you know who is currently undecided in this race.**

Thank you for your support,
Team Manny Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| | [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-k/)
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-u/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-o/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhrkjid-ojdkijhkdh-b/)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Early to bed. Early to rise. Work like hell and organize.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
No matter what, we'll be ready -- if you step up now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, You know my favorite saying: _Early to bed, early to rise, work like hell and organize._ That's exactly what we're doing right now: working together to make this campaign as strong as possible before we have an official Republican opponent in just a few days. No matter which of the leading candidates it is, we know they'll continue to sow divisiveness and fear, when what we really need is unity and steady, moral leadership. **[Invest in the leadership we're showing here in Washington by donating $5 or more before tonight's midnight end-of-month deadline -- it really does make a huge difference to our campaign right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10273?t=5&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10274?t=6&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)

| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10275?t=7&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)

---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10273?t=11&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)
---
We set an aggressive and ambitious $75,000 fundraising goal because it's clear that the GOP is laser-focused on trying to take me out this November -- and whether it's childish name calling on Twitter or spreading misinformation through campaign ads, this is just the beginning.
National GOP leaders are just setting the stage for my opponent, who will pick up the Trump banner and wave it high as soon as he's won the primary next week. No matter who it will be -- and trust me, any of the options are pretty scary -- they will hit hard, right out of the gate.
**We have to be prepared. We're $15,678 short of our $75,000 goal, and we have to hit it by midnight tonight.[Will you invest in this campaign with a donation of $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10273?t=12&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10273?t=13&akid=8115%2E868730%2EDlHmNe)
---

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b21368a/488188466/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b21368b/488188466/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b213688/488188466/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b213694/488188466/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b213696/488188466/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b330/18e32a7f/4d970e18/7b213689/488188466/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

subject: crunch time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:

| | We know there's been a lot going on in the news, so we wanted to send you an update on the U.S. Senate race in Massachusetts: **FIRST:** Voters in Massachusetts have already started receiving ballots request forms in mail! **THEN:** The most important debate of this primary made it clear that Joe has what it takes to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington - and that Senator Markey represents a status quo that isn't working for most Massachusetts families. **NOW:** We're up against a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline AND are almost one-month-out from election day! **[Will you pitch in to ensure we have the resources to cross the finish line victorious?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390723/55b66746/260e49e7/809303c/224413857/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-July2020-FR-EOM?refcode=E4524-20200731-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,Other&amount=3")** | | **[DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390723/55b66746/260e49e7/809303d/224413857/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-July2020-FR-EOM?refcode=E4524-20200731-EOM2-SB-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250,Other&amount=3")**

-- Kennedy Campaign HQ

| |
* * *

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390723/55b66746/260e49e7/809303e/224413857/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390723/55b66746/260e49e7/809303f/224413857/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390723/55b66746/260e49e7/8093038/224413857/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")

body:
|
---
Friend -- It's almost midnight in Georgia.

Closing out the month, I'm amazed how far we've come in July.

**This was the month the GOP realized they're 100% on defense in Georgia and the state is slipping away from them:**
_
> * The polls found me NECK AND NECK with David Perdue.
> * The Cook Political Report upgraded this race to a TOSS-UP.
> * Mitch McConnell's super PACs committed over $25 MILLION to stop me.
> * Donald Trump even flew down to Georgia to prop up my opponent with a taxpayer-funded photo op!
_ **Friend, we've got to win this race.**

The GOP's mismanagement of this pandemic has been a true catastrophe.

And Republican politicians in Washington like my opponent, David Perdue, are still trying to unleash the insurance industry to jack up prices and deny coverage -- even during a public health emergency.

All the while, Donald Trump continues to demonstrate he's totally unfit for office -- a wannabe dictator with disgusting authoritarian instincts who will stop at nothing to hold onto power.

**This is an emergency.**

Friend, we're on the right side of history. But let me be blunt. It takes strong fundraising to win.

name: Abigail Sigler
subject: ICYMI: Bill Hagerty Joins Donald Trump Jr. On Triggered
body:
Peter,In case you missed it, Donald Trump Jr. hosted Bill Hagerty on his podcast Triggered last night.**Watch the show[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-y/) On the show, Don Jr. reminded viewers that Bill Hagerty was with Donald Trump before it was "politically expedient." Bill volunteered full-time for six months to help Donald Trump defeat Hillary Clinton. Unlike Massachusetts Manny Sethi, who instead [defended Obamacare](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-j/), [supports socialized medicine](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-t/), [donated to ActBlue](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-i/), [applied to work in the Obama-Biden Administration](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-d/) and [even pushed anti-gun propaganda in Tennessee schools](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-u/).Like Don Jr. said on the show, "Your opponent I've never heard of him before, and most importantly I know he wasn't there for us like you were in 2016 when we had no chance of winning. I know he wasn't vocal about Trump and supporting that agenda throughout. It's only now when he's running for Senate, magically he pretends he's all of a sudden on the team he wants to do all these things that are Trumpian. I've never heard of the guy before..."Bill Hagerty is the only candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Senator Marsha Blackburn, Donald Trump Jr., Fox News' Sean Hannity and more.Bill is the true Trump conservative who will go to Washington and fight alongside Senator Blackburn to hold China accountable, confirm constitutionalist judges, protect the right to life and fight for our Tennessee conservative values.Best,
Abigail Sigler | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-b/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-n/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phyuin-fuutjhhtj-p/)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We're about to fall short at this make-or-break moment.
Friend, we'll cut to the chase: **We're about to fall short of our critical end-of-month goal unless grassroots folks like you give right now.**

At this make-or-break moment, our extremist GOP opponent is spending millions of her own fortune to buy this seat and attack our people-powered campaign, and polling shows us statistically tied. So in a race this close, falling short is simply not an option.

**Here's the good news: We get one last chance to get back on track. Our group of generous donors is TRIPLE-MATCHING all donations until midnight tonight - and right now, we're only _$5 short_ of our July goal!**

We can win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats but only if YOU rush your immediate grassroots support. Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/match-3x](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e207/288179be/97d7553/348e0d98/2160198988/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkwLWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk390-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thanks for coming through when we need you the most.

Team Warnock

\---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Raphael Warnock
Date: Fri, Jul 31, 2020
Subject: This is AMAZING news!
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm running against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) for U.S. Senate, and I need your help: While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who has cashed in on her public office and been accused of insider trading, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service. I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post _says winning this race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate. Right now, we're running neck-and-neck with our opponent - but while she's spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, at this critical moment, we're falling incredibly short of our July goal.**
That's why this news is so amazing: **Our group of fired-up donors has upped their offer and will triple match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only until midnight tonight.** [Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _three times_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e207/288179be/97d7553/348e0d98/2160198988/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkwLWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk390-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
The fact that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red proves one thing, and one thing only: He's _terrified_ that his Senate majority is in _serious_ danger.
But here's the deal: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has outraised us by writing herself a staggering $15 million check - and you can bet there's plenty more where that came from.
In a race this close, falling short of our end-of-month goal isn't an option - and failing to take advantage of this rare match opportunity could mean handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we _have_ ****to win in Georgia.** So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you******to rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical triple-match expires: **
**[Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $15)- before tonight's midnight deadline - to have every dollar TRIPLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e207/288179be/97d7553/348e0d98/2160198988/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkwLWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk390-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
|

Please, pitch in now to elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue! | | | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e207/288179be/97d7553/348e0d98/2160198988/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkwLWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk390-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

subject: Will you add your name to this historic list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This is your last chance to be a part of Hoosier history and add your name to the wall for Indiana’s 5th! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469590?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

I’m so grateful for all Hoosiers who have already stepped up in the name of winning our battleground race in the 5th District.

The fight isn’t over yet, though.

We still need patriots to come through for the GOP and help us win big for Victoria Spartz!

This is your last chance to get your name on our special donor wall. We’re closing access tonight at midnight, and I wanted to make sure you got the opportunity to give before then.

This list of donors will be specially recognized and remembered as the Hoosiers who made the difference to help us win BIG.

Add your name NOW! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Victoria and I appreciate your support. She’s ready to get to work in Washington, and fight for the hardworking men and women in the 5th District. She’s not afraid to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the other liberal elites, and will always do what’s right for Indiana.

Will you help us send Victoria to D.C.? If we lose this seat, there will be virtually no hope of winning back our House majority. I don’t think America can afford another term with Speaker Pelosi in charge, do you?

Donate $3 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=3&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $6 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=6&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $10 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=10&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $20.20 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=20.20&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $50 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=50&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $100 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=100&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Donate $250 for Winning Back the House >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=250&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

I know that we can win this for Victoria and the GOP. We just need your help to get there.

Please don’t miss this opportunity to be remembered on our donor wall, and to make a real difference in the future of our great state and country.

Thanks for your support,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

Donate for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-5-073020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Will_you_add_your_name_to_this_historic_list_&amount=&mc_cid=e7925d2b09&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We have the opportunity to win this race, take back the Senate, and restore some independent leadership back to the Senate.

If we don't go full speed ahead in this final stretch and our opponent continues to outraise us, her and McConnell's attacks could dominate the airwaves.

We can't afford to slow down, in fact, **we need to pick up the pace.**

We haven't accepted a dime of corporate PAC money, and that's something we are very proud of. But in order to pick up the pace, that means we're depending on hundreds of supporters like you responding to emails like these every day.

Every time we've needed your help, you've been there for us -- So I'm asking: [Will you split a donation between my campaign and 314 Action so we can pull ahead in time?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7b97/4bd7760e/515a8719/77a8c923/3765596896/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_kellyjuly20_split?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+Will+you+split+a+donation+between+my+cam&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200731_6MNTL-6MO-6MC_2DDon_RESEND_4_kellysplit&source=314_EM_FR_200731_6MNTL-6MO-6MC_2DDon_RESEND_4_kellysplit&refcode=314_EM_FR_200731_6MNTL-6MO-6MC_2DDon_RESEND_4_kellysplit")

With gratitude,

Mark

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: what Joe and I are still counting on before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm asking one more time: |
---
Peter,

I just wrapped up my grassroots fundraiser with Joe Biden, and I'm feeling inspired!

Grassroots events like these are my favorite parts about campaigns, even if they have to be virtual right now. It's a real chance to speak with people, and to thank supporters like you for everything you're doing to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden this November.

But look, Peter: grassroots fundraising is also powerfully important, because grassroots donors power Joe's campaign. And right now, Joe and I are still counting on more donors chipping in to make sure this campaign hits its fundraising goal before midnight.

[So, I'm asking one more time: can you make your first contribution to Joe Biden's campaign right now? Anything you're able to give will help reach our $8 million online goal before midnight and power this campaign to victory in November.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B4_EW-postFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B4_EW-postFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
Peter, if we're going to take back the White House in November, it's going to take every single one of us doing our part.

That's why I'm fighting every day to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot, and why I'm so grateful to have you in this fight alongside us.

Through this grassroots fundraiser alone, we've been able to raise over $1,500,000 -- _woo hoo!_ But Joe is still working towards his $8 million end-of-month fundraising goal for these last few days of July.

Anything you can contribute before midnight -- $3, $5, or whatever you can afford -- will make a real difference in ensuring Joe meets his goal and enters this final stretch of the campaign in as strong a position as possible.

[If you're as fired up as I am after tonight's grassroots event, can I count on you to make your first contribution right now?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B4_EW-postFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B4_EW-postFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d389e/2440990340/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d389d/2440990340/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d389c/2440990340/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d389b/2440990340/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d389a/2440990340/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3899/2440990340/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3898/2440990340/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3897/2440990340/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3896/2440990340/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3895/2440990340/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3898/2440990340/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3894/2440990340/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3897/2440990340/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fc/1cd0ac28/179dced8a/357d3893/2440990340/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer

name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, this is my last email about our July goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We've only got one shot at winning this race |
---
Peter, I know you've gotten a lot of emails from us over the past few days, but if you could read this last one before our midnight deadline, I'd be grateful.

[**And, if you can spare $5 tonight, I hope you'll chip in to help us finish July strong. My team tells me we could bring in less than 1,000 more donations by midnight and hit our goal, so please give whatever you can »**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [$5 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [$10 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [$35 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [$50 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
We are less than 100 days out from the day we've all been waiting for since November 9, 2016 -- a chance to put an end to Trump's disastrous presidency and put our country back on the right track.

Election Day is going to be here before we know it, but there's so much work we still need to do to make sure we have no doubt in our minds that we gave this fight our all.

The times we're living in are uncertain. And so much about our world looks different from where we were four years ago -- and even four months ago -- but one thing remains the same.

There is nothing that we can't overcome when we stand together.

I've been saying that since day one of this race, Peter, because I mean it. I'm consistently blown away by this team's ability to come together when it counts the most, and you give me so much hope for the future we're going to build together.

A future where everyone in this country gets a fair shot, finally. And a future where Americans are known for our hope and optimism, not divisiveness and pettiness.

That's what we can build together, Peter. But we have to win this battle first.

We've only got one shot at winning this race and stopping Trump from forever altering the fabric that holds our nation together, and I hope you'll take action before you close this email to help me do that in November.

[So I'll ask one last time, Peter. If you can give anything at all tonight to fuel our campaign to defeat Donald Trump, will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
[DONATE $5](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B5_lastjrb_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Thank you,

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395f/3696921612/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395e/3696921612/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395d/3696921612/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395c/3696921612/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395b/3696921612/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d395a/3696921612/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3959/3696921612/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3958/3696921612/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3957/3696921612/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3956/3696921612/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3959/3696921612/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3955/3696921612/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3958/3696921612/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9fd/1cd0ac28/179f8b557/357d3954/3696921612/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Did you see what President Trump just tweeted?
body:
President Trump is on #TeamHagerty!
Peter,Did you see what President Trump just tweeted? I'm so grateful to have President Trump on #TeamHagerty! [**You can see his tweet here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-y/) **No one in this race has more endorsements from conservative leaders than us.** President Trump, Vice President Pence, Sen. Marsha Blackburn, Sean Hannity, and Sen. Tom Cotton, Congressman Chuck Fleischmann and over 1,000 conservative leaders have all endorsed our campaign.I hope you'll join them in supporting our campaign by heading to the polls and voting right now. Don't forget, **tomorrow is the last day to vote early!**[**Find your early voting location by clicking here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-j/) Best, Bill | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phjzlk-fuutjhhtj-u/)

name: Terry Neese
subject: Hey, did you see this?
body:
FW: July Hey there,I wanted to flag this for you just in case it missed your inbox... This is our final monthly deadline before August's runoff election, and I really need your help to meet our goal! Take a look below, and if you can, would you chip in whatever you can to help?Thanks-Terry [Meet Our Goal - $20](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlidz-elutjhyju-r/) [Meet Our Goal - $50](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlidz-elutjhyju-y/) \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Terry Neese** <team@neeseforcongress.com>
Date: Tue, Jul 28, 2020 at 4:26 PM
Subject: Staying on the rails... - Preview
To: dpwillis67@gmail.comDear Friend,This is our LAST monthly goal before the August runoff election. We're so close to meeting our goal... will YOU be the one to put us over the top? [Meet Our Goal - $20](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlidz-elutjhyju-t/) [Meet Our Goal - $50](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlidz-elutjhyju-i/) [Meet Our Goal - $100](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phlidz-elutjhyju-d/) We're approaching the finish line in this election, but we need to hit our July fundraising goal to make sure we can execute our Get-Out-The-Vote and Election Day programs... to deliver a WIN in this critical runoff election!If we fall short, we have to make some hard decisions about what gets cut. Voter turnout? Last-minute volunteer programs? Fighting back against last-minute attacks?There's a lot at stake in this election: the right to life, the Second Amendment, securing the border, and unleashing our economy. But the clock is ticking.Are you with us? [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-u-phlidz-elutjhyju-h/)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: You. Me. Dinner.

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: TODAY Is The Last Day to Early Vote: Together, We Can Redeem the Soul of Our Nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
http://www.tndp.org [http://www.tndp.org]

Dear Peter,

"Ordinary people with extraordinary vision can redeem the soul of America by getting in what I call good trouble, necessary trouble. Voting and participating in the democratic process are key. The vote is the most powerful nonviolent change agent you have in a democratic society. You must use it because it is not guaranteed. You can lose it."
Congressman John Lewis

These words were part of a final message from Congressman John Lewis that he requested be published on the day of his funeral. [https://www.nytimes.com/2020/07/30/opinion/john-lewis-civil-rights-america.html]

Congressman Lewis dedicated his final days to doing what he did so relentelssly and graciously all his life - call us to action for the good of the country. So t oday, on the last day to vote early for the August 6th primary election , i t's up to all of us to heed his words and make a plan to make GOOD TROUBLE - and vote.

Why do we need to vote and make Tennessee a hotbed of GOOD TROUBLE? Because this week, at the exact moment the country was mourning the loss of a civil rights giant, Secretary of State Tre Hargett's attorney was arguing to the Tennessee Supreme Court against allowing increased access to absentee voting during a global pandemic [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/local/2020/07/30/tennessees-chief-justice-absentee-ballot-battle-important-case/5531857002/] . Said one Supreme Court Justice to the state's lawyer, "You talk about absentee voting like it's a privilege, not a right..."

Whether you're voting early or on election day, 2020 is the year w e make so much GOOD TROUBLE that we take back the White House and elect more Democrats up and down the ballot. Here's a list to help you plan for voting during COVID-19:

MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE: Will you vote early or on election day? In the morning, lunchtime, or at night? Will you take the kids?
TODAY IS THE LAST DAY TO EARLY VOTE: Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission to find:
Locations, days and times
Sample ballots

[https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]

WEAR A MASK & SOCIALLY DISTANCE WHILE WAITING IN LINE
BRING A PHOTO ID
ELECTION DAY IS AUGUST 6 AND NOVEMBER 3: You will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here:
[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]
.
*
ABSENTEE VOTING: If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. More info on absentee voting can be found here.
[https://sos.tn.gov/products/elections/absentee-voting?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]
.
*
DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot
[https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/?emci=ea607c28-6fc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6362892]
*
PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 615-327-9779, fill out this incidident report form, reach out to the TNDP voter protectection Director, Kendra Lee, at kendra@tndp.org with any other questions or problems you have about voting.
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSft6wbM_pq57TuelhFVLjPr5YqeKq-Yy5P8PYv04GHf-Ul0lw/viewform]
,
John Lewis recognized that the elections of 2020 are the most important elections of our lifetime. There's no time to lose. Make GOOD TROUBLE. VOTE.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-26%20at%2010.42.43%20AM.png]

One of the most impactful ways to volunteer for the November 3rd election is to train to become a poll watcher. Since the gutting of the Voting Rights Act there have been countless measures aimed at suppressing the vote in traditionally vulnerable communities. Republicans have teamed with election commissions to deploy modern day voter suppression tactics. Poll watchers will be the person on the ground at each polling site ensuring every individual has the right to exercise their right to vote. As a poll watcher you will:
Resolve voting issues with voters outside the polling place (i.e., outside the 100-foot boundary)
Collect all relevant information and quickly report it “up the chain”
TNDP is currently recruiting volunteers to be poll watchers. Email Kendra@tndp.org [Kendra@tndp.org] to volunteer.
Attend our protect the vote information session! [https://www.facebook.com/events/636327330339650/]

IT'S CRUNCH TIME. WE NEED YOUR HELP
Here's the reality: July and August are traditionally the hardest months to raise money in politics. And because of COVID-19, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection program, our get out the vote program, our outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all depend on the resources we can raise right now.

We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update July 24-July 31
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A886)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

Friend,

This week I had the pleasure of traveling to Midland to see our president speak to Texas job creators and many of our state and nation’s conservative leaders. His message was inspiring and gives me hope for the future of our country, in spite of the many challenges that lie before us. As you all know one of my greatest concerns is preserving the integrity of our elections - ensuring that every law-abiding American, no matter his or her beliefs or background, has their right to vote protected. That right includes the guarantee that his or her vote COUNTS and is COUNTED. I fear that many Americans won’t have that guarantee this November. President Trump is right to shine a light on the serious problems with mail-in-voting. He is right that universal vote by mail is completely different from absentee voting. And he is right that vote by mail opens numerous doors to election fraud. So what can be done? How can we respond? True the Vote is taking action, mobilizing volunteers across the country, training them on how to best serve. [Please join us today, help us ensure a secure, free, and fair election for all. ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A911)

Onward,
Catherine

---
| | NEWS TO KNOW

**1\. New York Board Of Elections Finishes Counting Absentee Ballots****...FIVE WEEKS after Election Day**
If anyone wants a sneak peak into what Election Day Month? may look like, take a look at New York. "More than a month after ballots were cast in the New York primary, the board of elections just finished counting all absentee ballots. In some races, those votes were the deciding factor. Suraj Patel is one of many candidates who waited anxiously for the results. Ultimately, he was defeated in the 12th Congressional District. Patel is accepting the outcome but says the absentee process desperately needs reforms. "We know that nearly 25% of people who actually went through the trouble of requesting a ballot, getting it, voting and dropping it in the mail will not have their ballots counted," he said. Patel has boxes filled with copies of invalidated absentee ballots. The issues are wide-ranging, from where the post office stamped the ballot to voters forgetting to sign it. Not to mention some who said online that they requested an absentee ballot but never received it."[https://newyork.cbslocal.com/2020/07/29/new-york-primary-absentee-ballot-results/](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A912)

**2\. Postal Service backlog sparks worries that ballot delivery could be delayed in November** We already know many of the limitations of the US Postal Service. However, less than 100 days from the election, they are already admitting a backlog - this is only one reason why we are urging voters to vote in person on election day. It is the only way to ensure that your vote is counted. "The new policies have resulted in at least a two-day delay in scattered parts of the country, even for express mail, according to multiple postal workers and union leaders. Letter carriers are manually sorting more mail, adding to the delivery time. Bins of mail ready for delivery are sitting in post offices because of scheduling and route changes. And without the ability to work overtime, workers say the logjam is worsening without an end in sight. As states look to dramatically expand the use of mail-in ballots this fall, postal workers across the country said the changes could lead to chaos in November. "I’m actually terrified to see election season under the new procedure," said Lori Cash, president of the American Postal Workers Union (APWU) Local 183 in Western New York."
[https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/postal-service-backlog-sparks-worries-that-ballot-delivery-could-be-delayed-in-november/2020/07/30/cb19f1f4-d1d0-11ea-8d32-1ebf4e9d8e0d_story.html](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A913)

3\. Pennsylvania’s mail ballot problems kept tens of thousands from voting in a pandemic primary
Pennsylvania continues to reflect the overwhelming problems with expanded vote by mail. "Before May 12, almost 90% of voters who requested mail ballots ultimately voted, and the vast majority did so by mail. But many mail ballot applications, almost two out of five, were processed within three weeks of the election. And for those voters, only about 76% ended up voting. That’s a significant difference: Without that drop-off, about 92,000 more Pennsylvanians would have voted in the primary, according to the Inquirer analysis."
[https://www.inquirer.com/politics/election/pa-mail-ballot-deadlines-disenfranchisement-20200730.html](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A914)

4\. Poll: More Than Half Of Young People Lack Resources To Vote By Mail
A recent survey shows that _"more than half of voters under the age of 35 say they don't have the resources or knowledge they need to vote by mail in November.
The poll was conducted by Global Strategy Group for NextGen America, a group that is focused primarily on engaging and turning out young voters."_ Data also show that [minority](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A915) voters all too often get the short end of the stick under a universal mail in structure - they tend to move more often and may not have their most updated address in the voter rolls. Never mind that liberals champion vote by mail as a great equalizer of voting rights. The facts show that such a claim could not be farther from the truth.
[https://www.npr.org/2020/07/30/896993401/poll-more-than-half-of-young-people-lack-resources-to-vote-by-mail](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=94A139A14A916)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK Friend, This week I had the pleasure of traveling to Midland to see our president speak to Texas job creators and many of our state and nation’s conservative leaders. His message was inspiring and gives me hope for the future of our country, in spite of the many challenges that lie before us. As you all know one of my greatest concerns is preserving the integrity of our elections - ensuring that every law-abiding American, no matter his or her beliefs or background, has their right to vote protected. That right includes the guarantee that his or her vote COUNTS and is COUNTED. I fear that many Americans won’t have that guarantee this November. President Trump is right to shine a light on the serious problems with mail-in-voting. He is right that universal vote by mail is completely different from absentee voting. And he is right that vote by mail opens numerous doors to election fraud. So what can be done? How can we respond? name: Team Hicks
subject: Today @ 3pm: You’re invited to Not-So-Fancy Farm
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
You’re cordially invited to “Not-So-Fancy-Farm,” a virtual rally with candidates from Kentucky’s 6th district to kick off the campaign season. RSVP now!

name: MJ Hegar
subject: What we did last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Our team pulled together in a way that I just couldn't have imagined.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebb/7f51f7bc/4021305a/4ef7a8ba/95787062/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, a thank you is in order!

July was our best month since this campaign kicked off. We won the runoff and raised over $1 million immediately after, which gave us _strong_ momentum. **[Can I count on you to help us keep it up?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebb/7f51f7bc/4021305a/4ef7a8b9/95787062/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.1nd__1827__&amount=10")**

This grassroots campaign has already welcomed more than 56,000 donors, but we can't let our foot off the gas! **Defeating Sen. Cornyn will take all of us.** He's got over $14 million on hand, and Big Pharma, the gun lobby, the private prison industry, and the Koch network are lining up to bail him out.

**If you 've been waiting to donate, [now's the time to take the plunge.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebb/7f51f7bc/4021305a/4ef7a8b9/95787062/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.1nd__1827__&amount=10")** The non-partisan _Cook Political Report_ is saying that "Texas is very much in play" and _Inside Elections_ just upgraded this race in our favor! Our momentum is undeniable, but that means Sen. Cornyn will go all out to stop us.

I'm counting on you, Peter, because this is such an important race for all of us, across America. **What happens in November will determine the path of our country for decades to come. Are you with me?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: warnockforgeorgia.com
subject: we fell short (bad news)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
This is bad, friend: **We fell short of our critical end-of-month match goal - which could ruin our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
---
Now, our Republican opponent Kelly Loeffler is spending MILLIONS of her personal fortune to buy this seat and attack our campaign, and polling shows us neck and neck! In a race this close, falling short is simply not an option.
**Here's the good news:** We get one last chance to get back on track. Our group of generous donors just agreed to EXTEND our crucial triple-match - up to $15,000 - but only for the next 48 hours!
We don't know when, or _if_ , another incredible opportunity like this will come around again. **So please, friend, will you give $5 or more now - as much as you can spare - to have every dollar go _three times_ as far so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/match-3x](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e208/288179be/97b5483/348e0d91/80262934/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk486-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thanks for powering us forward.

Team Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Raphael Warnock
Date: Fri, July 31, 2020
Subject: This is AMAZING news!
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm running against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) for U.S. Senate, and I need your help: While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who has cashed in on her public office and been accused of insider trading, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service. I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post _says winning this race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate. Right now, we're running neck-and-neck with our opponent - but while she's spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, at this critical moment, we're falling incredibly short of our July goal.**
That's why this news is so amazing: **Our group of fired-up donors has upped their offer and will triple match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only until midnight tonight.** [Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _three times_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e208/288179be/97b5483/348e0d91/80262934/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk486-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
The fact that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red proves one thing, and one thing only: He's _terrified_ that his Senate majority is in _serious_ danger.
But here's the deal: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has outraised us by writing herself a staggering $15 million check - and you can bet there's plenty more where that came from.
In a race this close, falling short of our end-of-month goal isn't an option - and failing to take advantage of this rare match opportunity could mean handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we _have_ ****to win in Georgia.** So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you******to rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical triple-match expires: **
**[Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $15)- before tonight's midnight deadline - to have every dollar TRIPLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e208/288179be/97b5483/348e0d91/80262934/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk486-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
|
---
| Reverend Raphael Warnock is running for Senate to expand access to health care, defend the dignity of working people and fight voter suppression. Please, pitch in now to elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue! | | | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e208/288179be/97b5483/348e0d91/80262934/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk486-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

body:

| Peter,
We need strong leaders in Congress to stand up for our country, our President, and our freedoms. Our nation is under attack from a variety of anti-American sentiments being pushed by the radical left.
One of the leaders I serve with in Congress is Congressman Lee Zeldin. Lee and I worked together to defend President Trump from the bogus attacks by Nancy Pelosi and the radical left designed to overthrow the President.
[Donate $20 to fire Nancy Pelosi this fall >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s24KATMFJGDGDkjz4nPwAwESoUAwu1-0XwbI5hArtbBMpqtUxmCSHg911JiElxaCbk98InPDOoVkWOEcq838IKchUgIyR50xU3I0ArqYbF68KZ_K1Jc5Fg8nkjOEoNtKSezVIaGKa9Gil3dMDHrREvlWypJYquWAS_dNaTyHB9PydeDJeb8I6F68PCdk846hFrLbPx325U8=&c=38Yh86yL2CvDAP0_9zN01u68AVZDcQT-jnx9Tgfpz9WWGVcNDRmBlg==&ch=SWlQfKoL5J_oqMiw43Fb6A3BTiw7V928sSSEv9poEnfLovI2VDwRVw==)
Taking back the House and firing Nancy Pelosi MUST BE THE TOP PRIORITY of all freedom-loving Americans. With two more years in office, Pelosi will destroy the United States as we know it.
Lee and I are hosting a Zoom call on Tuesday, August 4, from 1:20-2pm, and we'd like to invite you to join our strategy session. Trust me, you won't want to miss this exclusive opportunity, by donating $20 today to Lee's re-election campaign.

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Thanks to this outpouring of support we're entering August in our strongest position yet to win this election. |
---
Peter --

The team will be sharing our fundraising totals for July soon, but in the meantime, I wanted to let you know that we hit our fundraising goal and had a phenomenal month.

What our campaign raised in July is thanks to the incredible effort of our team of grassroots donors. Thanks to this outpouring of support, we're entering August in our strongest position yet to win this election.

From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of our whole campaign team here, I want to thank you. Thank you so much, Peter, for everything you're doing to help in this historic moment.

Let me tell you what the support of our grassroots donors means to our campaign.

It means that we can keep running ads in the key battleground states that we'll need to win to beat Donald Trump on Election Day.

It means that we can ramp up our organizing in communities all across the country -- because that's how we're going to win this campaign.

It means that we can be ready to Get Out The Vote like never before this fall, and win this battle for the soul of America.

**And on a personal note, it means the world to me, Peter. Support from so many good, hard-working people across this country is the honor of my lifetime, I really mean that.**

[We're now just over three months away from Election Day, and every second counts. So if you're able, I hope that you'll help us keep up this incredible momentum by joining our grassroots donor team with your first donation to our campaign today. Even $10 would make a big difference.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.01_B1_jrb-ty_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.01_B1_jrb-ty_X__F1_S1_C2__nd_T2") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

As a way to show my appreciation for the grassroots team that is going to push our campaign over the finish line and win this thing, **I 'm going to call a few of the people who chip in through this email today and thank them personally for their support.**

Thanks again, Peter. I'm so proud to have you on my team.

Sincerely,

_Joseph R. Biden Jr._

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39e7/2946350647/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39e3/2946350647/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39e0/2946350647/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39de/2946350647/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39db/2946350647/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39d9/2946350647/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39e0/2946350647/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39d7/2946350647/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39de/2946350647/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e8/1cd0ac28/1793a20e4/357d39d5/2946350647/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: counting down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I have some exciting news -- our donors have agreed to **extend the matching period for another day.** That means there's still time to support Mark Warner's re-election campaign -- and to double your impact. **[Every dollar you're able to chip in counts as two dollars.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826d2/2175281606/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

This election is one of the most important in our lifetimes, and to make sure that Mark Warner has a path to victory on November 3rd, we're looking for all the grassroots support that we can get.

I know that you've heard from Team Warner a lot this week, and your support means the world to us. If you have the means, please consider chipping in and doubling your impact toward our July goal.

Donation link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826d1/2175281606/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

I appreciate your support!

-- Jenny, Finance Director
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director**
Subject: counting down

> | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826d0/2175281606/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
> ---
> [**Donate before midnight to DOUBLE your impact**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826df/2175281606/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")
> Derek --
>
> We're just a few hours away from the end of July, so I'll get straight to the point. We're coming to the end of the month, and it's critical that we hit our fundraising goal to send Mark Warner back to the Senate. I'm coming to you with some good news: **Generous donors agreed to match every dollar we raise, up to $10,000! That means your donation will be _doubled._
>
> [If you have the means, will you chip in to help us reach our goal before midnight?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826de/2175281606/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=ask4&amount=5")**
>
> We can't afford to fall short on our fundraising goals. We all know that the election is going to look different this year, and we need to make sure our team has the resources to adapt to virtual events and educate voters about their options to cast their ballot.
>
> Plus, the last time Mark Warner was on the ballot, he won by less than 1%. Our team knows that we can't afford to take anything for granted. With the Trump campaign and GOP donors pouring money into Virginia, we need to make sure we have the resources to reach every voter and keep Virginia blue in November.
>
> We could not do this without you. Our team is what keeps us moving forward to support Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ballot. Right now, I'm asking for your help to meet our July goal -- **and your impact will be doubled.**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> [DONATE $5 (Now $10!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826dd/2175281606/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")
> [DONATE $10 (Now $20!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826dc/2175281606/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
> [DONATE $25 (Now $50!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826db/2175281606/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")
> [DONATE $50 (Now $100!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826da/2175281606/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
> [DONATE $100 (Now $200!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826d9/2175281606/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")
> [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826d8/2175281606/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
> Thank you for your support.
>
> -- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
>
>
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9d/53d9897e/5417114e/1c8826c7/2175281606/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200801_f_1_nd__690__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
