I won’t keep you long. I just wanted to reach out and thank everyone who has come through for me in July. It was another important month for our... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/48566b5c210e/how-we-flip-the-house-2088266?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=992407cd4f&e=f1831b4ca2)

| Friends, I won’t keep you long.

I just wanted to reach out and thank everyone who has come through for me in July.

**It was another important month for our campaign, and our grassroots community answered the call. **

Your support means the world to me, and I truly couldn’t compete without you. Our campaign is powered by the people of the Lowcountry, and I’m honored that you have my back.

**I was just going through our final fundraising report for the month, and I didn’t see your name on the list of End of Month donors. ** I’m reaching out in case you missed our emails and still want to make an impact on our campaign. If you want to contribute any amount to help me put the Lowcountry first, use the link below to donate to my campaign.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088266/Lowcountry-first/](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f9ae00adbf&e=f1831b4ca2)

Sincerely,

Nancy Mace

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Breaking: Hoosier Realtors endorse Eric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Our campaign just got another huge boost, and our momentum is surging thanks to this endorsement. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=62d3a629f80b43fc9844f63c013e17fd&_e=C5PJ5hDIXCZAJbYAMCoJs6hKK2vnH6Fe7pLfJjeeiThMm1wklRFnwbdh-Aq6UdooEMXAC86ipU_W9HXLfobeBea5Gyu2Dv6xj_jLQD30ajt_MBDVnaoLv65sIBM7GbbllBvxD6s_vD994_bhQYHxFwfdqSDDpE3_U4lpwrXXa15cRbz_djsF-X7I3c-VEmZ0SQwTKSQT_zugHJ9dvS-meYYp43Pr_a1Y5XPyajMK4274rs7RgOlKaW7GMcEa6huP8nWhgOU2n9ryZdvGXjKSnhmuKoYU4cu6ZbpZvNmfvEN7r7Q1SUtsMBku6gfSTYwjV718uXlw1-deITB4bxWUZ9dV2cvjMDYuEi6xIIjH0LxSN3n8RTyiFfpBzK8mCcGfTGcQA_ixJFKJeXgWxzAmHsjMDUozUU_z8_R3OTe3kUXaIPZdCYtQzHKOEExtm4SF6b1Qh5fSWZQHGLOi5H4FhXhZ9QFcC6M2PsiIhDRq3YrAAbAwf7GcQBc1mHCsYrL8) |
---|---|---
|
---
Hey friend

Our campaign just got another huge boost, and our momentum is surging.

The Indiana REALTORS®️ Political Action Committee (RPAC) just endorsed Eric’s re-election campaign, and committed to helping the governor continue to build One Indiana for All over the next four years.

**In other words, they are “Sold” on the governor’s focus on the economy and steady leadership.**
_**What Indiana’s Realtors had to say about Eric**_
_“The real estate industry nationwide depends on a thriving economy and high quality of place. Here in Indiana, Governor Holcomb understands that and has been laser-focused on both throughout his first term. Governor Holcomb also understands that our affordable housing is a competitive strength and has been a steadfast ally of Realtors in protecting it._

_Now more than ever we need a steady leader. And Governor Holcomb is exactly that. He doesn’t get sidetracked. He is data-driven, positive, and inclusive. The Realtors PAC is proud to endorse Governor Holcomb’s reelection and looks forward to the accomplishments of his second term.” - Bernice Helman, 2020 president of the Indiana Association of REALTORS®️_
[**Join them and endorse Governor Holcomb —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=62d3a629f80b43fc9844f63c013e17fd&_e=C5PJ5hDIXCZAJbYAMCoJs6hKK2vnH6Fe7pLfJjeeiThMm1wklRFnwbdh-Aq6UdooEMXAC86ipU_W9HXLfobeBea5Gyu2Dv6xj_jLQD30ajt_MBDVnaoLv65sIBM7GbbllBvxD6s_vD994_bhQYHxFwfdqSDDpE3_U4lpwrXXa15cRbz_djsF-X7I3c-VEmZ0SQwTKSQT_zugHJ9dvS-meYYp43Pr_a1Y5XPyajMK4274rs7RgOlKaW7GMcEa6huP8nWhgOU2n9ryZdvGXjKSnrc-OD8WGi3hlCcy0ib1wULSQefnMZASydrn_nCRBMb40LZn1pQ-FzQmNULKc-MNjkwb9zByGDJLKaV7OqqNqTwnlB56HUFVxMFSkdniqX3jB9z9khT7ALkZVu7NanGpoZ8EH5CZ7MO1vqytrvtENs3AaCOP-fldTUSDADjS32CeIs32ssdFJ9TzxFJSMnooNtdq0npRETZ9WjicKLbgrFh37atTyyaLJYQ9do0C0cYN)
RPAC represents the political arm of the Indiana Association of REALTORS®️ — a trade association made up of 19,000 Hoosiers who work on every aspect of the real estate business in Indiana.

We’re honored that RPAC endorsed Eric, and proud that they’ve recognized the work that Eric has done to build a robust economy and booming real estate market in our state. We’re proud that they trust the governor to implement the Back on Track plan and re-open Indiana.
**What Eric had to say about the endorsement**
“Indiana’s Realtors are out telling and selling Indiana’s story every day – a story of a state that just months ago set records in job creation, wages and investment. As we continue to get back on track, we’ll build upon this momentum to keep growing a world-class state with endless opportunity. That’s One Indiana for all. I’m thankful to have our Realtors as partners, and thankful for their support.“ - Governor Eric Holcomb.
[**Endorse Governor Holcomb —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=62d3a629f80b43fc9844f63c013e17fd&_e=C5PJ5hDIXCZAJbYAMCoJs6hKK2vnH6Fe7pLfJjeeiThMm1wklRFnwbdh-Aq6UdooEMXAC86ipU_W9HXLfobeBea5Gyu2Dv6xj_jLQD30ajt_MBDVnaoLv65sIBM7GbbllBvxD6s_vD994_bhQYHxFwfdqSDDpE3_U4lpwrXXa15cRbz_djsF-X7I3c-VEmZ0SQwTKSQT_zugHJ9dvS-meYYp43Pr_a1Y5XPyajMK4274rs7RgOlKaW7GMcEa6huP8nWhgOU2n9ryZdvGXjKSnnEQkM0Xiw7puZhrEIPWZMv96X7F_XVvf8Blq3h7BI0Zf0rCLBZ5ucpbRtPCt0u39bZvWDcZSXkaXpVvD2jRqqMXCTTJJLEysrJS817GExFkl31cSMMfE5OTNSuG2tvvFLvvi-XIzaqcXyKoWzG49BMPsJRWMEX1wKDVAQyTl0ALPoc3L0-4MZ0vqXpP53kLANzSHGC9P4awoboprG8TltO1efXQZUcbWbyYQsfhI_zZ)
More and more groups from across Indiana are coming together to support Governor Holcomb’s results-driven leadership and endorse him for re-election, but the endorsement he cares about most is yours.

Will you add your name and join the growing number of Hoosiers endorsing Eric’s re-election campaign?
[**Endorse Governor Holcomb —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=62d3a629f80b43fc9844f63c013e17fd&_e=C5PJ5hDIXCZAJbYAMCoJs6hKK2vnH6Fe7pLfJjeeiThMm1wklRFnwbdh-Aq6UdooEMXAC86ipU_W9HXLfobeBea5Gyu2Dv6xj_jLQD30ajt_MBDVnaoLv65sIBM7GbbllBvxD6s_vD994_bhQYHxFwfdqSDDpE3_U4lpwrXXa15cRbz_djsF-X7I3c-VEmZ0SQwTKSQT_zugHJ9dvS-meYYp43Pr_a1Y5XPyajMK4274rs7RgOlKaW7GMcEa6huP8nWhgOU2n9ryZdvGXjKSnm_78-qBqWuX3ouhM1utcYPM6Lm91An_yzNLQxQzGbJbslQRkLgn7lnrNEWoHzJ0rOC7Eq9dDKrqoUQRBmR4VAaP1fdu_aF7iHKxlr0mUlFxa8mGb0dxPUAaP-OqhH4DSYYR3uOtCnKVgifkXL0i1zmqRapcIbeWow3OiZusdZHy84PbRpF77lI9NswsqRwAp5dXzayx2fbFxSCXrmpdSXUnoqdJlr2S40_IeTjjdVig)
Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

We’re proud that they trust the governor to implement the Back on Track plan and re-open Indiana. What Eric had to say about the endorsement “Indiana’s Realtors are out telling and selling Indiana’s story every day – a story of a state that just months ago set records in job creation, wages and investment. As we continue to get back on track, we’ll build upon this momentum to keep growing a world-class state with endless opportunity. That’s One Indiana for all. I’m thankful to have our Realtors as partners, and thankful for their support.“ - Governor Eric Holcomb. More and more groups from across Indiana are coming together to support Governor Holcomb’s results-driven leadership and endorse him for re-election, but the endorsement he cares about most is yours. Will you add your name and join the growing number of Hoosiers endorsing Eric’s re-election campaign? Thank you for your support, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Mackler
subject: Join End Citizens United & James Mackler for a virtual conversation!

body:
Happening this Monday ->
|

[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d2/18d6a294/4c7087d0/26d7eb44/1781235860/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | We want to make sure you don't miss this: The nation's leading political reform organization, End Citizens United, is virtually coming to Tennessee to hold a conversation with their endorsed U.S. Senate candidate James Mackler! We hope you'll join us for this discussion about how to get big money out of politics, and how we flip Tennessee's open seat. **_End Citizens United and James Mackler_
Discussion on Reforming Washington
Monday, August 3rd
5:30 p.m. CT/6:30 p.m. ET** [_**RSVP HERE ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d2/18d6a294/4c7087d0/26d7eb45/1781235860/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmecu080320") Today, Washington works for special interests, and that's not working for all Tennesseans. Here's why: Ten years ago, the Supreme Court handed down its _Citizens United_ decision, giving special interests the power to flood our elections with dark money and buy a seat in the Senate to make sure their agenda gets rubber stamped. That's why we're unable to pass meaningful changes people desperately need on fixing health care, reducing drug prices, curbing gun violence, and even securing our elections. Both James and End Citizens United are committed to eliminating the corruptive influence of dark money and protecting our democratic values. That's why James isn't taking any corporate PAC money, and it's why End Citizens United endorsed James' Senate campaign. [_**During the virtual event Monday, James will talk about our efforts to flip the critical open Senate seat in Tennessee without the help of corporate PAC dollars. We hope you 'll join us -- admission is free and open to everyone.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d2/18d6a294/4c7087d0/26d7eb45/1781235860/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmecu080320") Hope to see you there, Team Mackler P.S. If you can't attend the conversation on Monday, [_**you can still help flip this critical Senate seat by making a contribution today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d2/18d6a294/4c7087d0/26d7eb42/1781235860/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA4MDEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200801?refcode=jme200801_m_other&refcode2=107423")

name: Defeat Sen. Cornyn (via MJ Hegar)
subject: Flip Texas, flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Here's what they stand to lose when we win Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8b7/2623549895/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8b6/2623549895/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=10")
---
**Since the runoff, this team has made a lot of progress, Peter**. Everyone's seen how we've come together after the runoff to build a team strong enough to defeat Sen. Cornyn. Even Ted Cruz has been sounding the alarm about how **"if [Republicans] lose Texas, we lose the Senate in 2020, all the ground that we gained in the last four years can be lost."**
[HELP WIN TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8b6/2623549895/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=10")
---
**What ground is Ted Cruz talking about?**
* He's talking about **tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations** that left working families behind.
* He's talking about the **lawsuits to repeal the Affordable Care Act** and gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
* He's talking about the complete **lack of oversight** over the expanded power of the executive branch.
* He's talking about the mountain of bills -- bills that would **protect voting rights, lower drug prices, and preserve expanded unemployment benefits** during this tough time of COVID-19 -- that are **sitting on Mitch McConnell 's desk, gathering dust.**

We have to be honest, Peter, all of those sound like pretty good things to reverse!

Ted Cruz is right -- Democrats ARE fighting to win in Texas, because we know that it's time for real change. He's also right to be worried, because with you on our team, **we truly CAN win in November.**

**Help us win, Peter.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8b4/2623549895/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8ab/2623549895/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8aa/2623549895/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8a8/2623549895/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__")**
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8b6/2623549895/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.2nd__1829__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8ae/2623549895/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1829&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e85/7f51f7bc/40258370/4ef7a8ac/2623549895/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Launching our Finance Committee, shout out from Pres. Trump, fundraiser with Rand Paul, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/abc0f53b95aa8627c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/0d7955fca991f105c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Finance Committee Formed to Steer Funding Strategy**
A finance committee of advisors has been announced, with the goal of steering campaign funding strategy for the Republican primary and beyond.
The group is headed by Messner Campaign Finance Chairman Ray Pinard, longtime Republican strategist and former chairman of the Greater Manchester Chamber of Commerce.

“Each member brings a set of skills that will be critical as we work to defeat career politician Jeanne Shaheen in November,” says Corky. “I am so pleased to have them on the team.”
Serving with Pinard are:
* G. Frank Teas, President and CEO of Millyard Bank;
* Paul Clark and Alex Sinclair, of Clark & Lavey, a benefit advisory and consulting firm;
* Neal Nicholson, of Nicholson Law Firm, PLLC, and a former Goffstown police officer;
* Lawrence Melanson; former executive of Coca-Cola New England;
* Richard Botnick, Vice President of Botnick / 5 Ventures Inc. and President and CEO of E&R; Laundry & Dry Cleaners.
* Harold Turner, Chairman Emeritus at The H. L. Turner Group, Inc.;
* Senator Ruth Ward (R-Stoddard), a retired nurse practitioner who has served as a state senator since 2016; and
* Mary Jane Beauregard, a longtime Bedford community activist and facilities management company owner.

|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/130a8b135e77ca07c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky’s visit to Cheshire County earlier this week included a swing through Keene, where he met with local GOP leaders and local business owners. One stop was a tour of People’s Linen. Check out this **[_Keene Sentinel_ story](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/2fa60c20cc213351c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**, which reports on his tour of the facility and his thoughts on how New Hampshire businesses are coping with the impact of COVID-19 pandemic shutdowns.
|
---
**Corky Gets a Shout-Out from President Trump**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/03699b09bf061c6dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
President Trump’s July 30 Tele-Rally to New Hampshire and Maine voters included a shout-out to Corky. You can listen to the President’s remarks by **[clicking here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/2e4264adce977969c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** – his reference to Corky can be heard at the 1:58 minute mark.

Many thanks to our Commander-in-Chief, who endorsed Corky’s run against U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen and for his continuing efforts to lead the nation out of the pandemic and restore our economy. With his help, Corky will be victorious this fall and honorably serve Granite Staters in the U.S. Senate!
|
---
**Virtual Fundraiser Set with Sen. Rand Paul**
Leading conservative U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) will headline a virtual fundraiser for Corky August 17.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/9c04efc919d57801c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Sen. Paul announced his endorsement of our campaign in June. At that time, he said, “One of my favorite things about New Hampshire is the ‘Live Free or Die’ spirit of independence and liberty. Having more senators in Washington who embody those ideals and can amplify that message in Congress is needed now more than ever. Fortunately, with Corky Messner, the Granite State has a candidate who is prepared to do just that.”

Check our **[website](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/3583664eae96ea96c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** and social media pages for details coming soon.
|
---
**Corky Headed to the North Country**
Corky will take his message to North Country voters next week, with a list of stops soon to be finalized (check our website and Facebook page for details in the next few days). His visit will include talking to small business owners, local GOP activists and others who will share the challenges they face as New Hampshire emerges from the pandemic shutdown.
|
---
**Sign of the Times**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/a11a49d6c778dd76c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Want a Corky sign for your lawn or street corner? Looking for another way to show your support for Corky? An official Corky for Senate yard sign is a great way to show everyone where you stand and support the campaign!

Request yours now before we run out! **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/15fca203de3859b2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to learn more.
|
---
**IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO**
**HEALTH INFORMATION**

New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/248967fa99449792c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/db2351ae72e6ed6cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/4f3b994f831e449ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Centers for Disease Control: What to do if you are sick with coronavirus disease – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/3724de7ebdb64428c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR BUSINESSES/EMPLOYMENT**

NH Department of Employment Security
Due to COVID-19, all claims and questions should be directed to **[nhes.nh.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/b53afd742760d34bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** or call the Unemployment Assistance Hotline at 603-271-7700.
Coronavirus (COVID-19): Small Business Guidance & Loan Resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/0f4ada163eaef2f3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Resources for Small Business – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/3fbdd797714a3904c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR PARENTS AND SCHOOLS**

NH Department of Education – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/a4d726ce39bda770c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
How to Home School Your Children – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/896c8aebc2e40962c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**FOR ASSISTANCE – FOOD**

Meals on Wheels – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/4999cec148a7d993c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
NH Food Bank – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/10c7969bb9d22cb9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
School Food and Nutrition Service – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/babbd72dee6dae5ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP**

NH Food Bank – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/31b9f7994d3764cbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
American Red Cross – New Hampshire – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/bfb6d1d94e249aa4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Meals on Wheels – To volunteer – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13a96c16419e56f0/502a6c3512f3f96bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last Monday, Governor Greg Abbott announced an extension on early voting
in the state of Texas citing continued challenges posed by the coronavirus
pandemic.

The good news is that voters will now have more time to cast their ballots
safely. Early voting for the November general election will now begin on
October 13, instead of October 19, with the early voting period still
ending on October 30.

But the bad news is that this extension throws off our plans to flip the
State House and stop Trump's second term. Our success is dependent on
reaching out to every single Democratic voter in Texas before they have a
chance to cast their ballots. Voters can now cast ballots six days earlier
than we'd initially planned for — meaning that's six fewer days that we
have to reach voters on the phone before it's too late.

We've said from the start that it's going to take all of us reaching out,
starting now, to win in November. And now with this early voting
extension, that's never been more true. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200801-99625&t=1001&akid=99625%2E444211%2ENumErp ]So, can we count on you to
donate a couple hours of your time to call Democratic voters across Texas
next week — before it's too late?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200801-99625&t=1002&akid=99625%2E444211%2ENumErp ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200801-99625&t=1003&akid=99625%2E444211%2ENumErp ]Thursday, August 6, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200801-99625&t=1004&akid=99625%2E444211%2ENumErp ]Get more info or RSVP »

So much is at stake this election. We need to work together and give it our
all to elect a Democrat majority into the State House and stop Trump
forever in November. We hope you'll join us to do your part.

Thanks,

Kate Roberts
Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=99625%2E444211%2ENumErp

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Phase 3, School Reopening, and Job Training
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's hard to believe, but it's been five months since Rhode Island's first confirmed case of COVID-19. So much has happened so fast--we've had to close and then slowly reopen our economy and we have tragically lost more than 1,000 Rhode Islanders to this disease. This virus is very much still with us, and it's critical that Rhode Islanders continue to stay informed this summer. Here's a quick recap of our new announcements from this past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL867WHusJLOzeqE8R1g7aLAzajTY-xJ0GIfGcR673Cgf1G0HQT_bkTV5f9wo15JgigQ_q79-kx4gvOMH-XRwiZb48xW3iqa0ZP1mN-HocSMtZV066kow7vucCZMDssFmJ_lB3UP-zeyWf2yNd9Ck8TR1XfIt9LZewgeh3b-zP6_Kt5uoJp23urzoJzIqf18UAFClo2VaYexcix8XZ2DLwDapG6-MMnBrZ7P-tjQouOC9U8TI_nDb2KDKCsLdJcplQY_1xMl1AZCPRzdWefLnRi1RE=&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
STAYING IN PHASE 3

A few months ago, I showed you [our benchmarks](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL867WHusJLOzeq5CTWv2GzakbmzCFUwndEAAyIQqly-iew6cVa8AKgOScyv9bAIIRy4iVIj35HQJtfjbR5EwiuZhTQ9Gxb1y3QzpNVD6PQhOsursJ5UA8ef6aqJlhbiAa871lLczep7Lv9a0M6lQ_epKnyEAOTrtZBicH7MBmcvnp8u45AL8jsJ3A=&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==) for moving between phases of reopening. As you can see from those metrics, we want our rate of spread to be 1.1 or lower. In the past few days, we've seen this number increase to 1.3 or 1.4. Based on this data, it's clear that we're not ready to move forward into another phase, but we also don't need to move back a phase either. We are now extending Phase 3 for another 30 days - through August 28 - with one restriction to social gatherings. We are lowering the social gathering limit for both indoors and outdoors to 15 people.

The Department of Health looked through contact tracing of nearly 4,000 positive cases and identified a trend: social gatherings are a problem. Often we traced many cases - sometimes as many as 10 - back to the same social event. To those of you who are continuing to gather in big groups with friends - knock it off.
| | |
---|---
|
BACK TO WORK RI

On Tuesday, I announced [Back to Work RI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL867WHusJLOzeqyiaY1mcr6RiVfckweAQ0dV4pmkvyIqGir1FMc6oBQMTlZ8XW4dPjRn77IHVyGNjMOXxjwaB_Z7wAV0ok0hmovQ==&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==), a first-in-the-nation program aimed at breaking down barriers to hiring and providing skills and support to thousands of Rhode Islanders impacted by COVID-19. We're dedicating $45 million in federal stimulus funds to train and support 5,000 to 7,000 Rhode Islanders for good jobs in our new economy.

This program will create opportunity for those who have been left behind for too long -- people without a degree past high school, people living in poverty, formerly-incarcerated individuals, parents who took time off, people in low-wage jobs that have been threatened by automation, and people of color. Back to Work isn't just a goal--it's a promise. More than a dozen companies have already signed a pledge to hire collectively more than 3,000 Rhode Islanders, and to hire with a focus on competency over credentials. And for our part, we're training people for the targeted skills they need for these jobs, and providing supports like childcare, transportation, career coaching and more to make sure they can see it through. [Watch the announcement with our partners](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL862ss76K050Tl6yT7-lMKnH-2TaO86Pha4DY9G_HfSZGDW6dHZqgZrYAgO-k4hpru5__LW6mkeZLL4epy_q_yI8IGmKZGepA4H_34-K9IuVTHu_V0HhdMn68Rdn28DHTxGX2LSJYtCRc7ck8DJTcYmkM=&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==), or go to [dlt.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL867WHusJLOzeqIKYZukJI2XhVtnTlhUZHk3hWayzPleFHXQtTusv2NzaJJ6m003gFdvyDOg8Ky9ysUAzy2UWR8oM=&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==) to learn more and sign up for updates.
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOL REOPENING METRICS
As with every decision we've made during this crisis, our efforts to reopen our schools will be driven by science and data. We've identified a clear, comprehensive set of benchmarks we need to hit in order to be confident we're ready to fully reopen schools. Those metrics are: statewide readiness, municipal readiness, testing readiness, supply readiness, and operational readiness. And we've assembled a team of local and national health experts to guide us during this process. The week of August 16, we'll make a determination about the start of this school year.

It's our job to work day and night to get to a point where we can say with confidence we check every box on this list. If not, then it means we're not ready to fully reopen on August 31. Every school district must be prepared with both in-person and remote learning options, and parents will be able to choose the option they're most comfortable with.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hasIwDrL88zFNbRKenRle71ixe3LNCdmA5Lq1X8rGKvYW3OvsvL867WHusJLOzeqmjGP4p6W1fDPJw0hzRWR4W1pb7n2V6r9W3sufkMbFiOaw6ZYcPR3jwE-CA9Zi_CsNszBeBos6c8WB3a0U6DNhJ7LRjBOuffqx20lSrp4uPDGRmc0eTjfhawuJ1sl2WGR8KKnOtc6J8XjHLvaGeX4YfiYV44_We0m_vodW9FvGwPGw6Go14vzv9_QSQmOZyGhIP0fjr0CjccfhuQ1sArrMYGFJDvm_s0Z7jJIbpYTX31ymBqapw-AMfttt6om604uKXysEbhwtuU=&c=x6XJWn2Z--WEN_tkVKZFsYYSmIkvlmrlU1p7BPiXvI6giHe6zunf8g==&ch=-HI37pehZx94FzGLFIQMxadn8XlSNkRuPP9HHatxZCkBgTit7g2_tQ==).

body:
The first woman to serve as Vice President in American history. |
---
Peter --

**We 'll make this real quick.**

For the past few months, we've been sending our supporters the exclusive opportunity to get on the list to be the first to know about who Joe's running mate will be!

We believe you've received some of these emails, Peter. We're hoping you don't pass on this opportunity again!

When Joe selects his running mate, he'll be selecting the first woman to serve as Vice President in American history. **_This moment is history, Peter, and we want you to be a special part of it._**

[**Add your name here before time runs out to be one of the first to learn about Joe 's pick when we're ready to break the news »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4579/1770368689/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd") | **GET ON THE LIST TO LEARN ABOUT JOE 'S VP PICK FIRST**

**Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4579/1770368689/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd") **On the List?** No, not yet!
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4577/1770368689/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.01_B2_first2knowvp_X__F1_S1_C1__ns-nd")
---
We can't wait to share this big announcement with you when we're ready to announce it! We hope you'll be on the list of supporters who hear the news first!

Thanks for being a part of the team,

Biden for President

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4576/1770368689/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4573/1770368689/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4571/1770368689/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d456f/1770368689/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d456d/1770368689/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d456b/1770368689/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4569/1770368689/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4567/1770368689/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4565/1770368689/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4563/1770368689/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4569/1770368689/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4561/1770368689/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d4567/1770368689/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9e4/1cd0ac28/1796eaf38/357d455e/1770368689/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Team Ossoff
subject: 🎉 Thank you, from all of us!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We hit our fundraising goal! |
---
Friend -- We did it!

**We set an ambitious $100,000 grassroots fundraising deadline for last night, and this team topped it!**

A huge thank you goes out to this entire grassroots team.

We are a small-dollar, people-powered group up against an endless Republican war chest of corporate donors and super PACs.

Jon Ossoff's campaign was surging all of July, but we needed to raise a huge sum of grassroots money in the last week to keep pace. _This team has never let us down._

**Friend, the GOP sees Georgia slipping away.**

**And our strong grassroots fundraising, coupled with Jon's surging poll numbers, is only going to make his opponents even more desperate.** _They're already spending tens of millions to keep David Perdue in office, and they'll spend tens of millions more as Jon's momentum continues to grow._

**[We can't let up now, not even for a second. Will you help us get August started off on the right foot with a $5 donation today?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e206f/5b2c1286/3e28fbb3/25f12f38/2385341419/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_01_thx_j_g?refcode=em_2020_08_01_thx_j_g&amount=5")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s starting . . .
body:
I don’t need to convince you that Republican candidates are the best to deal with our growing challenges.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386700-911540-5121770-524ebb8418-308f622a28)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386700-911540-5121769-35e2df62a1-308f622a28) On Monday, early voting starts in Florida for our Primary.

Ninety-two days after that, we decide who is going to lead our government for the next four years.

I don’t need to convince you that Republican candidates are the best to deal with our growing challenges.

But I need to convince hundreds of thousands of voters what the consequences will be if we elect Democrats to office.

[Help me do that by donating today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386700-911540-5121769-35e2df62a1-308f622a28)

**
Help me show sensible Americans what our nation will look like if Democrats get their chance to “defund the police.”

Help me tell America’s moms and dads about Joe Biden’s intent to teach our children more about the “Islamic Faith” as Judeo-Christian values are eroded in our public schools.

Help me prove to America’s workers that our economy will come roaring back to prosperity if we reject the Democrat’s plan to socialize our economy with endless government handouts.

** You know how much is at stake, and to win, we need to get our strong message out to those voters who have simply had enough and need that extra push to vote with us.

[Donate today to fund our media campaign and let’s make victory in November a certainty.

Just chip in $10 to help us reach 20 voters.

](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-386700-911540-5121769-35e2df62a1-308f622a28) Thanks again for all that you do and I hope you have a good weekend!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. If you live in Florida, please stay safe and be sure to stock up as the hurricane approaches.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I wanted to send a quick note to say **thank you!**

My campaign finance director just let me know that we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal. I know this is a challenging and uncertain time for many, and I am so appreciative of your generosity and strong support.

As we look toward Election Day on November 3rd, we're shifting this campaign into high gear. We all know that the election is going to look different this year, and we're focused on making sure that Virginians know all of their options when it comes to casting their ballots this year.

There's do doubt that we're facing a difficult time, but I believe that Virginia's best days lie ahead. We need to continue to look out for each other, to work together, and to fight for what we know is right. I'm so proud to be entrusted with your vote in the Senate, and I'll continue to work hard to represent _all_ Virginians if I'm re-elected this fall.

Be well -- and thank you for your continued support.

-- Mark Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db9f/53d9897e/54113eae/1c882634/3998298192/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julty?refcode=20200801_f_2_nd__692__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

name: John Coady, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: They tried to stop us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
They're terrified of losing in November, and they know that it's a real possibility.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e87/7f51f7bc/4039ace6/4ef7a8f8/2364024206/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
**First:** Senator John Cornyn and his allies tried to stop us before we made it to the general election.

**Then:** Despite their meddling in our primary, we won the runoff and raised over **$1 million** in the week after.

**Now:** We need your help to fight back. Mitch McConnell, the Koch network, Donald Trump, Jr., Sen. Cornyn, and Ted Cruz -- they're all **_terrified_** of losing Texas, and they're going to throw everything they've got at us.

**They tried to stop us then, and they 're trying to stop us now. [Will you step up to keep us going strong?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e87/7f51f7bc/4039ace6/4ef7a8ff/2364024206/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.3nd__1831__&amount=10")**
John Coady
Deputy Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e87/7f51f7bc/4039ace6/4ef7a8ff/2364024206/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200801.3nd__1831__&amount=10")

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: NEW focus group invite for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There are only 16 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17. |
---
Peter,

There are only 16 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President.

This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump!

**So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help.**

[ Will you be a part of our Pre-Convention Focus Group and answer a few quick survey questions for us?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb6/3177890446/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb6/3177890446/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb6/3177890446/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")
---
We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and _less than three months_ left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing.

But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states.

So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean _everyone_!

The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that.

[So even if you've answered questions like this before, we count on surveys like this to gather new data and percentages as our team grows and new events (like the convention!) take place.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb6/3177890446/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")

**Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward.**
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb6/3177890446/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopeners_RS")
---
Thanks,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb5/3177890446/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb4/3177890446/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb3/3177890446/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb2/3177890446/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb1/3177890446/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eb0/3177890446/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eaf/3177890446/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eae/3177890446/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4ead/3177890446/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eac/3177890446/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eaf/3177890446/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eab/3177890446/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eae/3177890446/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba0c/1cd0ac28/179722ef5/357d4eaa/3177890446/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Sandy Smith
subject: When do "Lives Matter" to the Left?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

**The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. **

__Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)

**_I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iLU1yC5CL3Nxmng&b=WHP11dntMU1S4RHc1grhsA) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsjCxM7GxM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsjCxM7GxM)

They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death? I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I . I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this! name: Bill Olson
subject: People are voting now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms against the radical Socialists!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=guJykn7hSF6OuRU&b=V2dT3xmhxChdvybRssjGjQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

[**Sign up here!**](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWvGEB0RL-2FWje35-2FBQqcz7p77qJE3lf3Rz5MSCJ8NKcvUXiL67HQ3E82WzAvD9JLhXHJK0R2kfaMOLFwlmTFL7VJZPrSJyu0ix0g98AvweV-2BNTZsj0bvqkCdr5msqGmfQPoFQUJwMUmnzCWvoHB0HySoLWO-2BZ38WmjFaaXq3NGo8L5Kkt_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6iY84h-2FOLBthbuYKuIdWkasaV8Taq2PlgpPnIgu5CcI6g9Asn0CNQ-2FdVEEzHuGQfW3Rh2IL9eQS2HmDt-2FKUVP7RfYtIEjJwzGWj46qS0WkIf33L-2FW8wRSp-2BF1apicNkO-2FDlZxaEtWE6VV8108F6wngAJ06NFzjULgMhqigQQBrGOOpM0JcGpp3GtbzknnJ2XdixRJ1maQSJPiU81kH28gtd2h7Y5fX6tm8Xu7vvApkefp1VdEZzVWbVR9mDOAwRXMOBun6c786LhfoQC2OklxN0PUO3e6Dcz9KTyqT2JnNhfSCiTvYmkQN-2BbYvQdywJukj4QlKWkYSO6fy1pvDSD-2B2gpu0ViYpTCjnDiogzqRwIUw1qZ9liH4J5rhsDXTkfiuod239tVqwwRHGQuy7fQ0ynRmsjPEfv5tJcQnWaMNJgkeDumcNc8QrSFXDdbXSRK6vHmA3wmRgny3Bupb3x3rc7Cj4RQxJKmAQgazeYutVXaJ-2FQdO1J717A3-2BJQIFuknPGfFwlkpqIdJEN06KnA6M1SOOVWb-2Bm1-2FEkcbAA7VtMWF48wg2w8zv61NFceLzq6vp-2F7ST6HtV3-2FX83lk7feBRJmAyJ8WHxPNeCZORP6-2BsTuWo6AEL8RZFnWJuEPEN4-2FXkxeX1-2BCcp0mbYwtSrP7HN-2FIhKByyztApapccs1iFJ8uc5oPyQBKEoHKTxgOoGvMCeG28jTjWIqzlDHwSse-2Fc8db53WDVnGNSfkiezgbchlkjjlCKbWL3hTgVJ0xoouh2m)** **
Congressman McClintock has consistently worked against our district. He recently voted against the Great American Outdoors Act, which will bring much needed resources to National Parks including Yosemite -- one of the largest economic drivers in our district.
During the pandemic, Congressman McClintock has spread dangerous false information encouraging public complacency rather than vigilance toward the virus by comparing COVID-19 to “the flu” and refusing to wear a mask.
Worse, he’s been actively working against our democracy. A vocal advocate against voting by mail, Congressman McClintock has called the practice fraudulent, despite nearly 90 percent of the district voting by mail in the 2018 election. clean_body: | | | | Friends, We have to keep up the fight on every front. It's time to flip California's 4th Congressional District. Join me tomorrow on a virtual phone bank for Brynne Kennedy. I’ll give a talk to set the stage and then we’ll get to work. Congressman Tom McClintock has been an apologist for President Trump, consistently choosing to defend his political party over our constitution. It’s time to use the tools of our democracy to defend democracy and escort Tom McClintock out of public office. Congressman McClintock has consistently worked against our district. He recently voted against the Great American Outdoors Act, which will bring much needed resources to National Parks including Yosemite -- one of the largest economic drivers in our district. During the pandemic, Congressman McClintock has spread dangerous false information encouraging public complacency rather than vigilance toward the virus by comparing COVID-19 to “the flu” and refusing to wear a mask. Worse, he’s been actively working against our democracy. A vocal advocate against voting by mail, Congressman McClintock has called the practice fraudulent, despite nearly 90 percent of the district voting by mail in the 2018 election. This is particularly dangerous because it enables President Trump to potentially reject the outcome of the election and trigger a constitutional crisis. Congressman McClintock has failed his constituents and has failed his oath to defend the Constitution. Let's to get the word out against McClintock and get Brynne Kennedy elected to Congress. See you tomorrow, Jessica Jessica Morse 1079 Sunrise Ave , Suite B-275, Roseville , CA 95661
